'''Kodin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] and junk dealer on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] who had ties to the [[Exchange]]. He met [[Meetra Surik]], who was searching for [[IT-31]]. Kodin had stolen IT-31 from [[Tien Tubb]]. Surik secured the droid's release from Kodin after [[TT-32-GE3]] asked her to, realizing that IT-31 was not actually destroyed. IT-31 returned to Tien Tubb.

==Behind the scenes==
It is possible to sell [[T3-M4]] to him for about 500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. You can also provoke him into a fight and kill him. You can also buy a HK droid processor from him to rebuild [[HK-47]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
